sync_type: Unidirectional (Zoho → Mailchimp via Zoho Flow, middleware, or native connector)
popularity: medium — Zoho CRM users often pair with Mailchimp for email marketing at lower price point than HubSpot/Salesforce

authentication_requirements.zoho_side: OAuth 2.0 with scopes for Zoho CRM modules (Leads, Contacts, Accounts). Refresh token required (1h expiry).
authentication_requirements.mailchimp_side: OAuth 2.0 or API Key. Audience management scopes.

common_use_cases: Zoho Lead creation → Mailchimp subscriber add with lead score merge field
Zoho Contact stage change → Mailchimp tag update
Zoho Campaign member → Mailchimp segment membership
Bulk Zoho contact sync → Mailchimp audience (initial setup)
Zoho deal 'Closed Won' → Mailchimp list transfer + automation trigger

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Zoho OAuth token expires every hour
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Zoho CRM OAuth access token expires every 60 minutes. Middleware with stale token gets 401. Silent failure if not retried.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Implement token refresh in middleware (grant_type=refresh_token). Proactively refresh every 50 minutes. Retry with new token on 401.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Zoho contact duplicate detection differs from Mailchimp
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Zoho dedup by email is optional (can have multiple contacts with same email). Mailchimp strictly dedups by email. Sync creates Mailchimp errors.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Before sync: enforce email dedup in Zoho or choose which Zoho contact wins for duplicate emails.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Bulk sync of 10,000+ contacts hits Zoho 250 req/min limit. Sync pauses or fails midway.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Batch with 2-second delays between requests. Implement exponential backoff on 429.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Zoho CRM has unlimited contacts. Mailchimp free/paid plans have subscriber limits. Bulk sync exceeds plan and Mailchimp rejects contacts.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Apply Zoho CRM filter before sync (e.g., Lead Status = 'Warm'). Monitor Mailchimp audience count against plan limit.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Zoho multi-currency to Mailchimp number field
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Zoho deal amount with currency symbol ($1,000.50) sent to Mailchimp number merge field fails because of non-numeric characters.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Strip currency symbols and commas before sending. Send numeric string to Mailchimp NUMBER merge tag.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Time zone offset in Zoho datetime fields
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Zoho stores datetime in org timezone with offset. Mailchimp expects UTC or plain date. Mismatch shifts dates by hours.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Convert Zoho datetime to UTC before sending. Send only date part (YYYY-MM-DD) for Mailchimp date merge fields.

edge_cases_and_errors.error_code: Zoho custom lookup fields as IDs, not values
edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Zoho lookup fields to related records return record ID (e.g., 123456789), not the display name. Mailchimp displays the numeric ID instead of the actual value.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Resolve lookup field IDs to display values via Zoho API before sending to Mailchimp.

community_solutions.problem: Zoho API v2→v7 migration still catching users
community_solutions.solution: Zoho CRM API v2 deprecated 2023, v7 current. Many middleware still uses old endpoints. Check your API version.
Mailchimp max 80 merge tags per audience. Zoho has hundreds of fields. Prioritize 20-30 critical fields.
